explanation: Insertion: Adding quotes around 'Everyone' may prevent the Sigma rule from matching the keyword directly in the command line.
Substitution: Using the '-i' flag for case-insensitive search may alter how the Sigma rule interprets the 'Everyone' keyword.
Reordering: Changing the order of 'Everyone' and 'BUILTIN\Users' may prevent the Sigma rule from detecting the exact pattern.
